name: AGV Incline Torque Motor Sizing
description: A robotics engineer must evaluate the torque requirements of an Automated Guided Vehicle (AGV) climbing various inclines to properly size its drive motors. Using the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API, test a Pioneer P3-DX robot model on a dynamically created static, respondable ramp at four or more distinct incline angles (e.g., 0, 3, 6, and 9 degrees). Record the peak torque required by the wheel joints for each angle. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/incline_profiling.csv (columns: incline_deg, peak_torque_left_nm, peak_torque_right_nm) and a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/motor_sizing_report.json (fields: robot_model_used, angles_tested, max_torque_observed_nm, steepest_incline_deg). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
